title: Build enforcement hooks and scripts for ephemeral worker rules
description: Create automated enforcement so workers CANNOT skip documentation. This is infrastructure that protects the entire project.

pre_commit_hook.description: Git pre-commit hook that runs on every commit in the boothapp repo
rules: If a task file (.claude-tasks/*.json) is being worked on, its substeps array must be non-empty
If code files changed, at least one .claude-tasks/*.json or README.md must also be updated
No files in /tmp, /local, or any gitignored path can be referenced in code
No hardcoded paths outside the repo (enforce relative paths)
No TODO/FIXME/HACK comments without a matching task file reference

worker_startup_script.description: Runs when a CCC worker pod starts, before Claude Code launches
steps: Verify CLAUDE.md exists and is readable
Scan for any stale in_progress tasks (assigned_worker with no heartbeat > 10 min)
Reclaim stale tasks (set status back to pending, clear assigned_worker)
Write worker heartbeat file to repo: .claude-workers/<worker-id>.json with timestamp
Set up heartbeat cron (update timestamp every 5 min, commit+push)

worker_shutdown_hook.description: Runs when a CCC worker is about to stop (SIGTERM, idle timeout, crash)
steps: Commit any uncommitted changes to current branch
Update task file: if substep in_progress, add notes about where you stopped
Push task file update to main

periodic_audit.description: Runs every 15 min as a separate CronJob on RONE
checks: Any task in_progress with no heartbeat from assigned_worker > 10 min -> reclaim
Any branch with no commits in 30 min while task is in_progress -> alert
Any task file with empty substeps while status is in_progress -> alert
Count open PRs per workstream -> alert if > 5 (backlog building up)
Verify all workstream READMEs were updated in last 24h (stale = no one documenting)

claude_code_settings.description: settings.json overrides injected into every worker's Claude Code instance

hooks.description: On session end: commit progress, update task file, push everything
Before any file write: verify path is inside /workspace (repo), reject writes to /tmp or HOME

tests: Worker commits code without updating task file -> pre-commit hook rejects
Worker dies mid-task -> next worker sees stale heartbeat, reclaims task within 15 min
Worker tries to write to /tmp -> hook blocks it
Worker shutdown -> all progress committed and pushed, task file updated
Audit catches task with empty substeps -> alert generated
